positive: A symmetrical and graphically stylized depiction of a cosmic forest. The central subject is a cluster of glowing, bioluminescent trees and crystalline flora, forming an ethereal canopy against a deep indigo and nebula-streaked purple sky. The composition should feature strong, clean silhouettes of the foliage and roots, reminiscent of Art Deco patterns, set against a minimalist, highly contrasted background. Use deep jewel tones (sapphire, amethyst, emerald) with pops of brilliant cyan and gold light. The overall aesthetic should be highly ornamental, symmetrical, suitable for repeating patterns, and designed with crisp, defined edges. Minimalistic depth perception, flat vector illustration feel, suitable for screen printing.
negative: blur, grainy, bokeh, text, watermark, signature, low resolution, artifact, extra limbs, bad anatomy, dirty, messy, writing, noise, busy background, realistic photography
